response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches JSON reference for the song 'Ridin’ on Dreams'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for song lyrics. Corrected minor translation issues (e.g., 'rashiku' as 'as myself'). 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles anchored strictly to vocal activations. Instrumental segments between verses were left silent. Chorus repeat at 04:13 timed to the concert audience footage.

subtitles.original: ねえ、君がいたからだよ
subtitles.english: Because you were there.

subtitles.original: ねえ、ありがとうを何度も
subtitles.english: Hey, I want to say "thank you" over and over again.

subtitles.original: 今すぐに伝えたいんだ
subtitles.english: I want to tell you right now.

subtitles.original: さあ乗り込もう! Ridin’ on Dreams Yeah!!
subtitles.english: Alright, let's get on board! Ridin' on Dreams Yeah!!

subtitles.original: Wow oh oh… Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!) Yeah!!
subtitles.english: Wow oh oh… Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!) Yeah!!

subtitles.original: あぁ 小さな夢から
subtitles.english: Ah, from a small dream,

subtitles.original: 想像できないような
subtitles.english: it became a feeling

subtitles.original: 想いになったんだ
subtitles.english: I never could have imagined.

subtitles.original: わくわく止まらない!
subtitles.english: The excitement just won't stop!

subtitles.original: 何度迷ったって僕ら
subtitles.english: No matter how many times we get lost,

subtitles.original: 絆が舵になる
subtitles.english: our bonds become the rudder.

subtitles.original: ちょっとの不安だってさ
subtitles.english: Even a little bit of anxiety

subtitles.original: 吹き飛ばせちゃうんだよ
subtitles.english: can be blown away!

subtitles.original: 果てない旅路を今 漕いでる途中に
subtitles.english: On this endless journey we're rowing right now,

subtitles.original: 困難もあるでしょう
subtitles.english: there will surely be hardships too.

subtitles.original: それも力に変えて
subtitles.english: But we'll turn those into strength

subtitles.original: 一緒に進むんだよ!
subtitles.english: and move forward together!

subtitles.original: ねえ、君がいたからだよ
subtitles.english: Hey, it's because you were there.

subtitles.original: ねえ、夢では終われない
subtitles.english: Hey, it can't end as just a dream.

subtitles.original: 荒波も乗り越えていこう
subtitles.english: Let's overcome the rough waves together.

subtitles.original: “らしく” 輝いていたい
subtitles.english: I want to shine as myself.

subtitles.original: ねえ、君と会えたことが
subtitles.english: Hey, the fact that I met you

subtitles.original: ねえ、宝物だ から
subtitles.english: is such a treasure.

subtitles.original: 手を取り合い 声かけ合って
subtitles.english: Holding hands and calling out to each other,

subtitles.original: 地図など無い 未知の世界で
subtitles.english: in an unknown world with no map,

subtitles.original: まだまだ行こう! Ridin’ on Dreams
subtitles.english: let's keep going! Ridin' on Dreams

subtitles.original: Wow oh oh… Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!) Yeah!!
subtitles.english: Wow oh oh… Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!) Yeah!!

subtitles.original: 急な風が僕らの
subtitles.english: Even if a sudden wind

subtitles.original: 行く先乱そうとも
subtitles.english: tries to disturb our path,

subtitles.original: あの日誓ったんだ
subtitles.english: I made a vow that day.

subtitles.original: 覚悟は揺るがない
subtitles.english: My resolution won't waver.

subtitles.original: ちゃんとしなきゃ!って背中
subtitles.english: A bridge to tomorrow starts

subtitles.original: 明日への橋になる
subtitles.english: with a back that thinks "I have to do this right!"

subtitles.original: もっと大事にしなきゃね
subtitles.english: We have to treasure it more,

subtitles.original: “あたりまえ”は無いから
subtitles.english: because nothing can be taken for granted.

subtitles.original: 小さな船から始まるストーリー
subtitles.english: A story starting from a small boat...

subtitles.original: どっから始めたらいいか
subtitles.english: Wondering where to start,

subtitles.original: もがいて 少しずつね
subtitles.english: struggling, little by little,

subtitles.original: 輪になって 見つけた
subtitles.english: we formed a circle and found

subtitles.original: 何にも代えられない夢だ
subtitles.english: a dream that can't be replaced.

subtitles.original: Wow oh oh oh oh oh 未完成も愛して
subtitles.english: Wow oh oh... Love even the incompleteness.

subtitles.original: Wow oh oh oh oh oh 想いは一つだ
subtitles.english: Wow oh oh... Our thoughts are one.

subtitles.original: Wow oh oh oh oh oh 僅かな希望でも
subtitles.english: Wow oh oh... Even if it's a tiny hope,

subtitles.original: 僕と 君で ずっと
subtitles.english: you and I, forever,

subtitles.original: 馬鹿にされても 信じたい!
subtitles.english: even if we're mocked, I want to believe!

subtitles.original: ねえ、ありがとうじゃ足りない
subtitles.english: Hey, "thank you" isn't enough.

subtitles.original: ねえ、想いが溢れちゃうんだよ
subtitles.english: Hey, my feelings are just overflowing.

subtitles.original: ずっと一緒だよ!
subtitles.english: We'll be together forever!

subtitles.original: ねえ、君がいたからだよ
subtitles.english: Hey, it's because you were there.

subtitles.original: ねえ、夢では終われない
subtitles.english: Hey, it can't end as just a dream.

subtitles.original: 荒波も乗り越えていこう
subtitles.english: Let's overcome the rough waves together.

subtitles.original: “らしく” 輝いていたい
subtitles.english: I want to shine as myself.

subtitles.original: ねえ、君と会えたことが
subtitles.english: Hey, the fact that I met you

subtitles.original: ねえ、宝物だから
subtitles.english: is such a treasure.

subtitles.original: 手を取り合い 声かけ合って
subtitles.english: Holding hands and calling out to each other,

subtitles.original: 地図など無い 未知の世界で
subtitles.english: in an unknown world with no map,

subtitles.original: まだまだ行けるから!
subtitles.english: we can still go further!

subtitles.original: ひとりじゃない
subtitles.english: You're not alone.

subtitles.original: 何度でも立ち上がってさ
subtitles.english: Getting up again and again,

subtitles.original: 笑い合っていたい
subtitles.english: I want us to laugh together.

subtitles.original: 願いだって みんなで、さあ!
subtitles.english: Our wishes, everyone together, come on!

subtitles.original: 手をつないで 想像も超えて
subtitles.english: Hold hands and go beyond our imagination.

subtitles.original: まだまだ行こう! Ridin’ on Dreams
subtitles.english: Let's keep going! Ridin' on Dreams
